The Sunshine Protection Act would disrupt our natural sleep cycle — leading to serious health conditions like obesity, type 2 diabetes, heart disease, depression, and some cancers.

Let’s not repeat https://t.co/8ZmGm3GLlK

They keep our economy running and support public health, including vaccine manufacturing.
 
Grateful to meet with them and stand for protecting their union-strong work. https://t.co/xiWO5Yiwc4

To the United States Senate;
 
Do not confirm Todd Blanche for Attorney General. https://t.co/R8Z69JtliH

Excited to watch Citizens Bank Park shine for tonight’s All-Star Game! 🌟  And special shout out to Montgomery County’s own @VictusSports — official bat-maker of the MLB (and of PA-04).   Go Phils! ⚾️❤️ https://t.co/hQMH7RqKCY

I'm happy if our families can save at the pump.
 
Yet while President Trump touts “affordable” Freedom Fuel stations, prices are still too high for gas, groceries, healthcare, and more.

Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸
  
On our Semiquincentennial, may we reflect and rejoice on 250 years of the American Experiment. And may we always rise up to our promise of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

In March, our Commonwealth and community sounded the alarm: no inhumane warehousing of people in Berks or Schuylkill.
 
Now, ICE is backing down.
 
Accountability doesn’t stop here — what I witnessed in Moshannon, Philadelphia, and Dilley demands more from this administration.

We are at our best when we are engaged in our democracy.

That was clear at the Progress for the People Town Hall in Bethlehem!

So many of our vets carry a lifelong commitment to service, and we are fortunate to have their leadership in our region. https://t.co/ayToF9iv1w

For 27 years, the Bipartisan Women’s Caucus laid a wreath for our women veterans. 
 
This year, it was cancelled. 
 
The generations of women who have fought, died, and sacrificed for our freedom will not be erased. https://t.co/UrEXpCWRnf

Sending the best of luck from the East Coast to L.A. for our U.S. men’s team’s first match in the World Cup — especially PA’s own Christian Pulisic! ⚽️

Go Team USA! 🇺🇸

With the school year ending, I was delighted to meet with our Student Task Force one last time. 

They’ve brought me such joy, hope, and reflection. 

Good luck to our grads! And wishing our students, teachers, and staff a well-deserved summer break! 😎☀️ https://t.co/aynJKPbdqW

Yet this administration offers silence while families struggle with rising costs across the board.
 
It's shameful.

Americans overwhelmingly oppose this extreme immigration agenda.
 
We cannot pretend this is business as usual. https://t.co/FGLoCTeYBH

(We couldn’t resist this photo!) https://t.co/0dzKELOSOn

Because of these heroes, the course of World War II changed — and freedom prevailed over https://t.co/XSaaP0xfyS

Yesterday I met Adam.
 
He loves space and is one hilarious kid.
 
Thanks to a gene‑therapy trial, he’s thriving and chasing big dreams – likely in comedy!
 
I am grateful to CHOP and Adam's family for sharing his inspiring story and highlighting the need to invest in our kids. https://t.co/ZR5naANZpO

Last week, Berks County lost a dedicated public servant — Officer Kristen Yeager.

My prayers are with Kristen’s husband and three children, the Central Berks Regional Police Department, and the Pikeville community as they grieve this sudden and unimaginable loss.

Officer Yeager https://t.co/3EyvGbPcZ8

Always wonderful to welcome students from Berks to D.C.
 
Kutztown Area High School's AP government students asked thoughtful, impressive questions about how our government works.
 
Their curiosity and passion bring me hope for our next generation of leaders. https://t.co/jZRwzTdZlU

Our hearing with Acting AG Todd Blanche should concern us all.
 
He is not working for survivors of Epstein or the American people. 
 
He is working for one man — Donald Trump. https://t.co/rrRVBDbyoO

Thank you for using your voice! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/SGSFIEFYUE

Mariia’s piece “The Recital” will proudly represent PA-04 in the Capitol.

And congrats to our runners-up: Abigail & McKenzy also of Abington!

A beautiful evening to recognize our artists. https://t.co/3hahPAk1Ar

Here’s to the extraordinary women in our lives who love us, teach us, and shape us.

May we hold our loved ones close today. https://t.co/VuwEHk2Xco

We are lucky to live so close to the birthplace of American democracy. May it serve as a constant reminder of our duty to preserve it.

This National Nurses Week, I’m grateful to the decades-long work of Betty Long and the Guardian Nurses as we advocate for stronger protections.

It's time Congress passes my Save https://t.co/EhhYnDLJl6

In Star Wars: Andor, their message rings true today— leaders have a responsibility to tell the truth and choose integrity over manipulation. https://t.co/opDVaK7cqo

Our students are our future, and I was delighted to welcome Plymouth Meeting Friends School to learn how policymaking works.
  
Thank you for your thoughtful legislative ideas and real optimism for our country. You give me such hope! https://t.co/Z3ESLGRzrl

The House should have passed this bill weeks ago.
